publishedAbstract: - How to retire the existing backingstore and migrate the buckets to the new backingstore? **NOTE:** Due to a known issue with ODF 4.13/4.14, this procedure only works with BucketClasses that do not contain any Object Buckets. If Object Buckets do exist for the given Bucket Classes, it fails. **Red Hat engineering team is working to backport the fix [Bug 2279280](https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2279280)**
publishedTitle: ODF-Noobaa: How to Migrate NooBaa Buckets to a New Backingstore?
